protocol.outer_rng_note: default_rng(4200 + seed) is constructed as inherited single-draw provenance but not consumed by the amended scorer; scored simulations consume default_rng(5200 + k)

verdict.rule: A seed passes iff every one of the 46 gated cells holds (|ln(r_candidate / rate_a)| <= locked tolerance); the gate passes iff >= 4 of the 5 gate seeds pass.
